User Story: As a Procurement Officer, I want to describe my procurement need in natural language so that the AI generates a structured RFP draft based on best practices and regulatory requirements.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to suggest appropriate evaluation criteria and weights based on the type of procurement so that I create fair and effective criteria.
As a Procurement Manager, I want to select from RFP templates (open, restricted, negotiated procedure) so that the generated RFP follows the correct procurement process.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to generate appropriate CPV codes from my requirement description so that the tender is correctly classified.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to draft qualification requirements based on the estimated contract value and type so that requirements are proportionate and non-discriminatory.
As a Legal Officer, I want the AI to flag potential compliance issues in the draft RFP so that I can fix them before publication.
As a Procurement Officer, I want to iterate on the RFP in chat — asking the AI to modify sections, add clauses, or rephrase requirements.
As a Budget Owner, I want to provide high-level needs and have the AI expand them into detailed technical specifications.
As a Procurement Officer, I want to export the finalized RFP as a downloadable document (DOCX/PDF) from the canvas panel.
As a Procurement Manager, I want the AI to generate a procurement timeline based on the procedure type and EU thresholds.
As a Budget Owner, I want to search historical tender data for office rental prices per m² by city and region so that I set a realistic budget.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to show me comparable real estate tenders in my region so that I understand current market rates.
As a Finance Controller, I want to see price trends over time for real estate services so that I can forecast costs.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to suggest an estimated value range for my real estate procurement based on location, area, duration.
As a Budget Owner, I want to compare public vs. private sector rental rates in a specific location.
As a Budget Owner, I want to search for typical hourly/daily rates for different professional roles in public sector tenders.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to show me comparable staff procurement tenders with contract values and team compositions.
As a Technical Specialist, I want to search for typical qualification requirements for IT staff tenders.
As a Finance Controller, I want to compare staffing costs across countries for the same role types.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to suggest a price scoring formula based on the type of staff procurement.
As a Budget Owner, I want to search for typical costs of IT equipment in public sector tenders so that I create accurate budgets.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to show comparable equipment tenders with specifications and prices.
As a Technical Specialist, I want to search for technical specifications used in similar equipment tenders so that I draft non-restrictive specifications.
As a Finance Controller, I want to compare purchase vs. lease costs for equipment categories.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to detect if my equipment specifications are too restrictive and suggest alternatives.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to generate a price benchmarking report comparing similar historical contracts by CPV code, country, and value.
As a Procurement Manager, I want to see a market analysis canvas artifact showing price distributions and competition levels for my procurement category.
As a Finance Controller, I want to export benchmarking data as a report (PDF) to attach to the procurement file.
As a Budget Owner, I want the AI to alert me when my estimated budget is significantly above or below the market rate.
As a Procurement Officer, I want to ask the AI 'what is a fair price for X?' and get an answer backed by actual tender data with sources.
As a Legal Officer, I want the AI to validate that my RFP complies with EU procurement directives and national law.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to check that evaluation criteria are proportionate to the contract value.
As a Procurement Manager, I want the AI to estimate the expected number of bidders based on historical data.
As a Legal Officer, I want the AI to generate a compliance checklist for my procurement procedure.
As a Procurement Officer, I want the AI to review my evaluation criteria and flag if the price weight is abnormal compared to similar tenders.
As a Procurement Officer, I want to start a chat with 'I need to procure [X]' and have the AI guide me through the entire process step by step.
As a Budget Owner, I want to ask 'How much should we budget for [X]?' and get an AI answer backed by historical tender data.
As a Procurement Officer, I want to upload an existing tender document and ask the AI to review it for completeness and compliance.
As a Procurement Manager, I want conversation history preserved so that I can return to previous procurement planning sessions.
As a Technical Specialist, I want to ask the AI to generate technical specifications using examples from similar successful tenders.
